items.name: 🐉 Draconic Archmage Coat [PBR]
items.description:
Channel ancient dragon power with the Draconic Archmage Coat — a majestic blend of noble tailoring and primal might. Embellished with scale-like patterns and crimson trim, this coat embodies wisdom, fire, and command.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Elegant mage’s coat fused with dragon-scale detailing
Rich navy and crimson color scheme for a royal fantasy look
PBR textures add realistic depth and fabric sheen
Perfect for mages, sorcerers, and dragon-blooded avatars
🔍 Keywords: dragon, mage, coat, fantasy, wizard, magic, armor, robe, PBR, Roblox
Unleash your inner dragon —
the Draconic Archmage Coat commands both power and respect. 🔥🪄
